name: Pawn Shop
description_short: Zak's Famous 24 Hour Pawn Shop offers collateral-based loans, auto loans, and payday loans at their Santa Monica Boulevard location in Los Angeles, operating 24/7 with a 4.7-star rating.
description_long:
Zak's Famous 24 Hour Pawn Shop is an established pawn shop located at 6767 Santa Monica Blvd in Los Angeles, California. The business operates continuously, providing financial services around the clock to serve customers at any hour. According to their profile, they have built a reputation in the Los Angeles area for pawn and lending services.

The shop offers multiple financial products including auto loans, payday loans, and traditional pawn services. Customers can leverage personal items, jewelry, gold, and silver as collateral for loans. The business also buys precious metals and jewelry directly from customers, providing an alternative to traditional pawn lending. Their service offerings span both secured lending (pawn-based) and unsecured short-term lending (payday loans).

What distinguishes Zak's is their consistently high customer satisfaction ratings and staff quality. Multiple reviews specifically praise individual staff members by name—Rafael, Pedro, and others—for going above and beyond normal service expectations. One reviewer noted that Rafael spent time over a weekend with his own family to ensure customers received needed help. The 4.7-star rating from 535 reviews suggests sustained positive performance, with reviewers highlighting excellent communication, honesty in valuations, and pleasant interactions that contrast with typical pawn shop experiences.

However, potential borrowers should note that pawn shops and payday loans typically carry higher costs than traditional bank financing. While the company receives strong reviews for customer service quality, the fundamental nature of these products—auto loans, payday loans, and pawn services—means interest rates and fees will likely exceed mainstream lending options. The 24/7 operation is convenient but doesn't change the underlying loan economics.
address: 1534 S La Cienega Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90035

company_info.headquarters: 1534 S La Cienega Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90035

pros: 24/7 operations every day of the week provide access regardless of time or day
High customer satisfaction with 4.7-star rating from 535 verified reviews
Staff members are individually praised for exceptional customer service and willingness to accommodate clients
Honest jewelry and precious metal valuations—customers specifically report getting 'top dollar' for gold and silver
Multiple loan products available including auto loans, payday loans, and traditional pawn services
Transparent communication that customers describe as making processes 'simple and easy'
Established business with demonstrated community trust and repeat customer base
cons: Pawn shop and payday loan products carry higher interest rates and fees compared to traditional bank lending
No information provided about specific APR rates, loan terms, or fee structures on their profile
Limited details about loan approval process, collateral requirements, or how valuations are determined
As a payday lender, may contribute to debt cycles if used for recurring short-term cash needs
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash access outside traditional banking hours who have collateral or items to pawn
Individuals seeking to sell gold, silver, or jewelry without waiting for online buyers or auctions
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional lenders and need emergency auto or payday loans
diagnosis: Zak's Famous is best for consumers in immediate need of cash who have collateral or qualify for payday/auto loans and value convenient 24/7 access and respectful staff interaction. The main caveat is that these products (paywday loans, auto loans, pawn lending) are significantly more expensive than traditional bank financing; customers should exhaust other options first and understand the full cost before borrowing.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based lending secured by personal items)
